body: Amara, I wanted to follow up on our conversation last week about the [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) portfolio and some of the emerging dynamics I'm seeing in climate infrastructure deals right now. A few of the founders I've been speaking with at the seed stage are raising in a much more compressed timeline than last year — some getting from first check to close in under six weeks — and I think that's worth factoring into how you're sequencing your diligence on the current batch. I also wanted to share a note from the [Climate Tech Investors Coalition](orgs/climate-tech-investors-coalition) that came across my desk yesterday, which touches on some grid-edge AI applications that seem squarely in your lane. Let me know if it would be useful to set up a quick call this week — I have Thursday afternoon open and would love to think through a couple of these opportunities with you before they move too fast.
